EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-Voalte-ManagerNotification
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if($styleSheet) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end

User's Information


#if($map.get("User's Name"))User's Name:$map.get("User's Name")
#end #if($map.get("User's Network ID Provided By User (May be blank)"))User's Network ID Provided By User (May be blank):$map.get("User's Network ID Provided By User (May be blank)")
#end #if($map.get("User's Email Address"))User's Email Address:$map.get("User's Email Address")
#end #if($map.get("User's Type") )User's Type:$map.get("User's Type")
#end #if($map.get("Job Title"))Job Title:$map.get("Job Title")
#end #if($map.get("Department") )Department:$map.get("Department")
#end #if($map.get("Location"))Location:$map.get("Location")
#end #if($map.get("Employee Number"))Employee Number:$map.get("Employee Number")
#end #if($map.get("Telephone Number"))Telephone Number:$map.get("Telephone Number")
#end

Manager's Information


#if($map.get("Manager's Name"))Manager's Name:$map.get("Manager's Name")
#end #if($map.get("Manager's Phone Number"))Manager's Phone Number:$map.get("Manager's Phone Number")
#end #if($map.get("Manager's Department"))Manager's Department:$map.get("Manager's Department")
#end #if($map.get("Manager's Email Address"))Manager's Email Address:$map.get("Manager's Email Address")
#end

Submitter's Information


#if($map.get("Submitter's Name"))Submitter's Name:$map.get("Submitter's Name")
#end #if($map.get("Submitter's Phone Number"))Submitter's Phone Number:$map.get("Submitter's Phone Number")
#end #if($map.get("Submitter's Email Address"))Submitter's Email Address:$map.get("Submitter's Email Address")
#end

Application Information


#if($map.get("Application Name"))Application Name:$map.get("Application Name")
#end #if($map.get("Action"))Action:$map.get("Action")
#end #if($map.get("ENTITLEMENTS"))ENTITLEMENTS:$map.get("ENTITLEMENTS")
#end #if($map.get("Type of Access"))Type of Access:$map.get("Type of Access")
#end #if($map.get("Provisioning Comments For Application"))Provisioning Comments For Application:$map.get("Provisioning Comments For Application")
#end #if($map.get("Application Username Provided by Provisioning"))Application Username Provided by Provisioning:$map.get("Application Username Provided by Provisioning")
#end #if($map.get("Requestor Comments For Application"))Requestor Comments For Application: $map.get("Requestor Comments For Application")
#end #if($map.get("General Request Comments")) General Request Comments:$map.get("General Request Comments")
#end

Thank you,
The IAM Operations Team

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying managers when an employee's account(s) are modified. Note that in addition to the declared arguments, all workflow variables, Step arguments, and Approval arguments defined in the Workflow are also available.

Argument.name: identityDisplayName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: subject
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

EmailTemplate.Subject: SECURE- $!subject Access Request for USER $!identityDisplayName was processed
